# Alley Cat

> Social bowling tracker and local alley directory. Log games frame-by-frame, review and discover bowling alleys near you, and climb community leaderboards.

Alley Cat is a free Strava-style platform for bowlers. Track your scores, share games with friends, and explore a directory of 1,600+ bowling alleys across the United States with reviews, photos, and amenities.

## Pages

- [Home Feed](/): Public activity feed of recent games, reviews, and high-fives.
- [Bowling Alley Directory](/alleys): Browse and search 1,600+ bowling alleys nationwide.
- [Leaderboard](/leaderboard): Top bowlers ranked by average, high game, and consistency.
- [Log a Game](/log): Frame-by-frame score entry with strikes, spares, and splits.
- [Leagues](/leagues): Browse and join bowling leagues.
- [League Night](/league): Live league night scoring.
- [Bowling Score Calculator](/tools/bowling-score-calculator): Free frame-by-frame bowling score calculator.
- [Blog](/blog): Bowling tips, guides, and app comparisons.
- [Sign Up / Log In](/auth): Create an account or sign in.

## Blog

- [Best Bowling Tracker Apps of 2026](/blog/best-bowling-tracker-apps): Comparison of top bowling tracker apps including Alley Cat and LaneTalk.
- [How to Calculate Bowling Handicap](/blog/how-to-calculate-bowling-handicap): Step-by-step handicap formula and examples.
- [Bowling Stat Tracker Guide](/blog/bowling-stat-tracker): What to track and why it improves your game.
- [Bowling Scorecard App](/blog/bowling-scorecard-app): Digital scorecards explained.
- [Bowling Alleys Near Me](/blog/bowling-alleys-near-me): How to find quality lanes locally.
- [Bowling Score Tracker](/blog/bowling-score-tracker): Tracking averages and trends over time.
- [Bowling Scoreboard Online](/blog/bowling-scoreboard-online): Online scoreboards for casual play.
- [Alley Cat Bowling](/blog/alley-cat-bowling): About the Alley Cat platform.
